MOTION Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And For Relief From Forfeiture
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's motion to enforce settlement agreement and for relief from forfeiture.

Appearances:
Richard Hurlburt, Esq. (415) 391-6496 on behalf of plaintiff Marilou Samson and moving party
Ronald C. Specter, Esq. (949) 833-9400 on behalf of defendants Mary Zhu, Tommy Jang and Jackie Tang and opposing parties
Bradford J. Hinshaw, Esq. (408) 861-6500 on behalf of defendant Julie Lee

The following exhibits were marked: Court exhibit #1: World Savings Bank Adjustable Rate Mortgage Note Pick-A-Payment Loan, and Court exhibit #2: World Savings Equity Line of Credit Agreement and Disclosure Statement.

Having heard oral arguments, the Court granted enforcement of the settlement, and granted relief from forfeiture conditional upon the escrow closing by 4:00 p.m. on August 30, 2004. Written order pending.

JUDGE DONDERO; CLERK: V. MU; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE, #3321 (504)

Hearing Plaintiff Marilou Samson'S Motion To Extend Time To Close Escrow And For Release Of Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-05-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marilou Sanson, Plaintiff Propria Persona (415) 759-8710
William S. Choy, Esq., (415) 421-3500 for Defendant Old Republic Title Company
Jeffrey A. Dito, Esq., Valinoti & Dito LLP (415) 986-1338 Specially Appearing For Ron Specter For Defendants Zhu and Tang
Steven H. Bovarnick, Esq., Hunter and Bovarnick (415) 621-8700 for Defendants Lau and Hi-Tech Communications
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF MARILOU SAMSON'S Motion to Extend Time To Close Escrow is DENIED; Motion For Release Of Settlement Funds is premature and is OFF CALENDAR. ANDREW YEE, Esq. specially appearing on behalf of plaintiff Marilou Samson
